text: Hello, good morning. This is our Darwin C robotic operation creator and today I will demonstrate you some important learning skill.

The operator uses a sketch pen to draw a line on the surface of a grape. Using the Darwin C robotic system, the grape is stabilized with a micro needle holder while micro scissors articulate to cut along the marked line.
My procedures of endo wrist instrument as you know it can move in any direction without rumor and with extreme precision. You can keep to the ultra fine mode.

motion is scaling here we have changed to the ultra fine mode and then it is cutting on the these size lines of course you need to have a very good hand to do that but slowly once you will keep on practicing for many days you can make the line just sharp as sharp as a knife and it is impossible even to cut that up

and peel off the skin of the grape even with the open surgery and if you will take the open scissors then also it is not possible but with the Da Vinci robot if you will stabilize it slowly you will keep on cutting it on these linings with the keep on practicing for many days you can achieve this skill and that will reflect on your surgery on the human also like if you want to do pyeloplasty tubal recanalization

The Da Vinci robotic system is used to precisely cut the skin of a grape with micro scissors, while a micro needle holder stabilizes the grape. The skin is completely removed after the precise cutting is finished.
Two micro-dental holders are used; one stabilizes the grape while the other peels off the skin smoothly, demonstrating precise control.

So when you do that, you should try to maintain a smooth continuous traction. As we know that we don't have tremor in the Davinci robotic surgery, this entire grape skin can be peeled off very nicely.
So this is a very good task for the beginners to develop their skill. Thank you very much and please keep on doing that in your own Davinci robot.
